channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ancient DNA reveals women's role in transforming prehistoric Europe
item.description: New DNA evidence shows hunter-gatherers and early farmers interacted more closely than thought, with women likely playing a key role.

item.title: Caffeine reverses memory problems from sleep deprivation
item.description: Scientists found that sleep deprivation damages a brain circuit for social memory, but caffeine may help reverse the effects.

item.title: A newly discovered phase of matter could revolutionize quantum technology
item.description: By stacking custom silver nanoparticles like LEGO bricks, researchers stabilized a previously unseen crystal phase.

item.title: This Triassic crocodile relative resembled an ostrich dinosaur
item.description: Scientists identified Labrujasuchus expectatus, a strange crocodile relative that looked like an ostrich-like dinosaur.
